title: Copy Form Entry
excerpt: Is it possible for a form entry to be duplicated to submit multiple jobs by the user submitting the job? We have Product Managers submitting jobs for the graphics department, but sometimes they have a similar job with a …

posts.author: fredrickgiles (Fredrick Giles)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible for a form entry to be duplicated to submit multiple jobs by the user submitting the job? We have Product Managers submitting jobs for the graphics department, but sometimes they have a similar job with a different product number and it would be simpler if they could just duplicate and submit multiple jobs altogether.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @fredrickgiles

Our monday app EasyForm allows you to build forms in monday and dynamically pre-populate the form with URL parameters. So, for your use case, you can have two boards, one with job templates and a second one collecting the actual jobs.

You can see an example of this here. I pre-populated the name and email in this demo, but this can be done with all fields - including the people column and connected boards; check out our documentation here.

If you want help setting this up, or have any questions, you can reach us at easyformsupport@easyapphq.com or book a call with us here.

posts.author: fredrickgiles (Fredrick Giles)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, I’ll give this a try and see if this solution will work.
